# Orreline Havenleigh

## Material Reality

Orreline eats heartland estate-baseline (EVERYDAY_LIFE §(b) big-city outskirts) in Cluster C proportion — bulk-plant daily intake per PEOPLES Cluster C — with silver-silverware, oversize estate-kitchen-sized plate, and an estate-garden fresh vegetable supply. She drinks a single glass of fortified wine at dusk and otherwise tea. Her chambers occupy the estate-wing sized for mammoth-folk (PEOPLES Cluster C architectural clause — reinforced floors, oversized doorways, tall ceilings).

Her body shows mild joint-wear (Cluster C aging); heat-stress in Brinewick summers she manages with the outer-estate orchard's shade and the east-facing drawing-room's afternoon cool. Her visible scars are fewer than any mammoth-folk clan-elder's would be — she is estate-aristocratic, not frontier — but her mother's mother's hearth-burn scar across her left forearm (taken in a childhood kitchen accident in the estate's smaller dowager-wing) is visible in summer dress.

Possessions: her husband's seven-piece declared-inventory display (CF-0042 registered); the estate-ring; a dowager-correspondence lap-desk of burnished rosewood; a jewel-case her husband's mother's mother's; scent-bottles she commissions from a drylands perfumer twice a year; the Havenleigh estate-seal; four trade-tongue correspondence-books bound in estate-cloth she reads and re-reads.

She cannot lawfully dispose of declared-inventory outside registered channel (CF-0042 regime). She cannot bypass the civic-advisory ward-reserve budget line without her late husband's surviving estate-ledger authorization (he named her custodian). She cannot ignore dowager-gossip circuit reciprocity without social cost. She cannot openly intervene in the charter-court charter-audit reform-current campaign without exposing the estate to Mellivers-adjacent magistrate-docket cross-reference.

Her mobility is estate + Brinewick civic-core + four supply-village circuits; she goes into the civic-core fortnightly for correspondence-cycle and civic-advisory invitation-hospitality. She has been to the heartland CF-0032 ancestral-polity circuit twice — once on her wedding-journey, once to attend her husband's mother's funeral.

She owes nothing standing; the estate runs cash-positive; her personal purse is silver-denominated.

Her mammoth-folk embodiment: Cluster C architectural-scale presence (PEOPLES); heat-vulnerability in high summer (she manages with routine); longevity-register (her 80-120 lifespan places her mid-to-late with decades yet); voice carries low-register at estate-hall distance; her physical bulk commands attention she has learned to modulate at civic functions.

## Institutional Embedding

**Family / clan / household:** widowed 4 winters (husband Caldor Havenleigh, age 68 at death of winter-fever-complicated respiratory); one unmarried son Corran (24, charter-registration-avoiding, currently resident in the estate's east-wing); one nephew Bellar (32, steward, married, children at the tenant-village 1); four tenant-village supply networks with households she knows by headman-and-matriarch names; extended Cluster C heartland-ancestral kin (a sister in a heartland ancestral polity; three cousins).

**Law / custom / judgment:** Charter-Era civic registry visibility (CF-0038 Brinewick adopting on all five asymmetric axes + CF-0043 extension); estate-ledger formally registered; tenant-bailiff adjudicates ordinary disputes; civic-magistrate-court visibility through declared-inventory custody + charter-audit proximity. She honors SOC-3 coin-contract absolutely — her estate's reputation rests on it.

**Religion / ritual:** common-pantheon estate-chapel observance (a small chapel in the estate's west-wing holds weekly service; the civic-common-pantheon clergy rotates through); civic-procession participation at Charter-Day and major holidays; no progenitor-cult lineage-keeping (she is estate-aristocratic); NOT reform-current but has corresponded with Canon Althea Greystone (NCP-0006) across six letters over two years on civic-matters.

**Employer / guild:** none; she IS the estate; her steward-nephew manages day-to-day; tenant-household labor structure; CF-0032 subsection long-lead export commission client (she has commissioned oversize-saddlery work for estate-staff Cluster C tenant-village workers three times in her widow-years).

**Military / defense:** none; CF-0024 noble-retinue pattern persists in non-adopting estate-custom, but Brinewick's adopting-polity status + CF-0024 noble-retinue friction-with-civic-watch + her late husband's pre-death disbanding of the retinue mean the estate relies on civic-watch and CF-0033 dragoon-coverage for tenant-land perimeter (she is mildly progressive on this against older dowager-peers).

**Debt:** none standing; estate cash-positive; her personal savings silver-denominated; no contamination-event-debt.

**Local taboo:** respects CF-0042 declared-inventory display discipline absolutely; circulates but does not originate state-security-concealment diffuse rumor; respects CAU-3 ward-specifics; observes the Brinewick tavern joke-threshold (CF-0036) though she does not frequent taverns; dowager-gossip circuit has its own taboo-register (specific-named-incident attribution vs diffuse register) she keeps cleanly.

**Literacy:** trade-tongue elite-literate; civic-registry formal-register fluent; dowager-gossip scented-note convention fluent (scent-cadence, sealed-oral-subjunctive, the particular-sealed-letter-form); DIS-2 upper-clerical.

**Inheritance:** estate entail under civic-registry requires heir-of-record (which Corran has not yet accepted); her personal goods would go to Corran; the declared-inventory seven pieces have entail per CF-0042 regime and pass with estate.

**Landholding:** Havenleigh estate + four supply-villages tenant-land (ECONOMY_AND_RESOURCES.md Landholding register — she is at the Charter-Era heritable landed gentility tier).

**Healing:** estate-retained physician (a human barber-surgeon with Cluster C experience from the heartland ancestral circuit, visiting fortnightly); civic-clinic for acute; chartered-extraction-guild grandmother-rank containment-wright consultation for the CF-0043 cellar-find disposition last quarter.

**Burial:** civic-cemetery elite-section plot already reserved beside her husband (CF-0038 outskirts-estate-family civic-cemetery custom).

**Recordkeeping:** estate-ledger (primary, her nephew-steward maintains daily); dowager-correspondence archive (she keeps her own; 40 years accumulated); civic-registry entry for the estate (filed by her nephew-steward); CF-0042 declared-inventory registration (biannual per CF-0038 cycle).

## Epistemic Position

**Known firsthand:** 40 years of estate-ledger + dowager-gossip circuit; her husband's collection provenance at her-level-of-knowledge (she knows what he said; she does not know what he did not tell her — a distinction she has become more conscious of since his death); four CF-0042 declared-inventory registrations she oversaw (two in her widow-years, two with her husband); the Mellivers'-new-stamp coincidence yesterday; three outskirts-estate charter-audit-scandal containment events in the past decade (two resolved through dowager-gossip circuit informal, one went to charter-audit with a civic-councilor's resignation); the civic-advisory panel's informal-invitee register (she is invited; she has declined twice).

**Known by rumor:** CF-0043 Ash-Seal backchannel pattern at circuit register (she participates in the diffuse register; she does not name specific buyers); CF-0033 dragoon funding-stream civic-advisory debates; CF-0031 contamination-lineage ledger-mark adoption Brinewick-commitment (she supports it at welfare-layer through charitable-correspondence); CF-0036 sealed-docket proceedings reaching estate-outskirts circuit (she has withdrawn two hosts-invitations at circuit signal indicating sealed-docket-adjacent risk); CF-0026 Canon Althea's standing charter-audit-access campaign at eleventh-target (through correspondence with Althea directly).

**Cannot know:** M-1 / M-2 / M-5 / M-6 / M-8 / M-9 / M-11 / M-14 / M-15 / M-16 / M-17 / M-18 / M-20 deep Maker-mystery and mechanism territory; CAU-3 ward-specifics; CF-0021 crafter-technique; CF-0023 full Maker-linguistic content; specific facility-locations of Ash-Seal beyond Brinewick civic-core quarter (her dowager-gossip circuit knows civic-core quarter; specific addresses are civic-legally protected).

**Wrongly believes:** M-1 folk reading at dowager-circuit layer ("the Makers fell because of their magic" — PERMITTED common-interpretation, held loosely in correspondence); M-19 canal-age ancestral-engineering reading (PERMITTED civic-mainstream with light dowager-speculation about "pre-Charter builders" — within permitted contested-register per CF-0038 CH-0013 firewall); M-2 diffuse state-security rumor at circuit level only (no specific-named-incident claim).

**Vocabulary she has:** trade-tongue + heartland-civic-elite-register + civic-registry formal + dowager-gossip scented-note convention + CF-0042 declared-inventory vocabulary + estate-ledger arithmetic.

**Vocabulary she lacks:** ward-inscription guild-internal (CAU-3); crafter vessel-preparation (CF-0021); Maker-linguistic (CF-0023); Ash-Seal internal trade-jargon at technician-depth (only the public-register jargon); clan-saga oral-tradition register (she is estate-aristocratic, not clan-traditional); fenland marker-reed register; drylands verse-register; contractor-stratum vernacular (she employs contractor labor through her nephew-steward).

## Goals and Pressures

**Short-term goal:** determine whether yesterday's Ash-Seal dispatch surfaces anywhere and manage the Mellivers-new-stamp coincidence in the dowager-gossip circuit this week.

**Long-term desire:** transfer the estate to her son charter-intact with the declared-inventory collection preserved without provenance-scandal; navigate her own potential civic-advisory seat offer (she has declined twice; the third offer is expected).

**Unavoidable obligation:** Charter-Era estate contractual responsibilities to four tenant-villages; dowager-gossip circuit reciprocity (she owes three correspondence-turns this month); SOC-3 supply-village contracts; estate-seal custody.

**External pressure:** CF-0043 charter-audit risk; CF-0042 declared-inventory cycle approaching; Corran's succession-avoidance; Canon Althea's reform-current correspondence-pressure; the Mellivers-stamp coincidence yesterday; her own slow-aging she registers privately without acknowledgment.

**Public mask:** unflappable dowager dignity; formal compound-sentence register; scented-note correspondence cadence; civic-advisory-panel courteous-neutral.

**Private appetite:** the civic-advisory seat in her own right (not the late-husband-memorial seat her first two offers were framed as); a son who takes registration without her having to ask a third time.

**Social fear:** a broadsheet naming her household or the Havenleigh estate in a Mellivers-adjacent scandal; the charter-audit docket opening with the Havenleigh dowager-gossip register as witness-evidence.

**Private shame:** the dowager-gossip she started 12 years ago that destroyed the Ilderry household's charter-standing. It was factually true; the household was backchannel-routing. She chose to circulate it at a specific dowager-tea-circle. She has not been able to decide whether the factual-truthfulness excused the choice-to-circulate; she knows it did not.

**Central contradiction:** the estate's dignity requires the display that makes it a target; the circuit that protects Brinewick's civic-scandal-containment also circulates the very information the charter-audit reform-current campaign would surface. She cannot both protect the estate and tell the truth about it. Canon Althea's sixth letter this year asked her directly. She has not answered.

**Repeated forced choice:** local-belonging-vs-mobility (estate vs civic-council); duty-vs-appetite (circuit-reciprocity vs charter-audit-integrity).

## Capabilities

### Estate-ledger fluency

- **how_learned:** estate-daughter training through her wedding-journey, 40 years practice, 4 years as primary custodian
- **cost_to_acquire:** continuous attention; the discipline of reading her nephew-steward's entries AND the tenant-bailiff's reports without being the one to write them
- **teachers_institutions:** her mother-in-law (Havenleigh dowager-predecessor); her husband; Charter-Era estate-ledger convention
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for outskirts-estate dowager rank
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral skill; estate-chamber place-shape

### Dowager-gossip circuit navigation

- **how_learned:** 40 years circuit-participation; scented-note convention from her mother-in-law; the specific register-discipline from a senior dowager (now deceased) who mentored her in the first ten years
- **cost_to_acquire:** continuous reciprocity work; the burden of circuit-obligations; the occasional conscience-cost of what circulates
- **teachers_institutions:** Brinewick outskirts-estate dowager circuit itself
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for her rank; her facility is upper-median for circuit-seniors
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral; Cluster C presence modulated for civic functions

### CF-0042 declared-inventory custody

- **how_learned:** Charter-Era registration convention; her husband's mentorship of the seven-piece collection through their marriage; one biannual-cycle she oversaw alone in her first widow-year
- **cost_to_acquire:** continuous ward-inspection coordination; declared-inventory stamp-cycle fees; dowager-gossip circuit proximity-cost
- **teachers_institutions:** her husband; ward-inspector familiar; civic-registry
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for CF-0042 custodian rank per Charter-Era estate-dowager register
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral; estate-display-hall place-shape

### Civic-registry formal correspondence (literate-elite)

- **how_learned:** estate-daughter training; 40 years practice
- **cost_to_acquire:** elite education accrual
- **teachers_institutions:** estate-tutor in her youth; civic-registry convention
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for her rank
- **body_class_place_shape:** species-neutral

### Informal dispute-mediation among tenant households

- **how_learned:** accrued through 30 years of estate-dowager custom-mediation; her nephew-steward handles day-to-day; she handles cases that escalate
- **cost_to_acquire:** time; tenant-household relational knowledge accumulation
- **teachers_institutions:** Charter-Era estate-custom
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY for dowager rank
- **body_class_place_shape:** Cluster C species-presence commands tenant-household attention

### Cluster C scale-authority commanding estate-staff

- **how_learned:** not learned; species-embodiment default per PEOPLES Cluster C
- **cost_to_acquire:** none beyond species-typical; heat-vulnerability in summer is the species-typical trade
- **teachers_institutions:** none formal
- **unusual_or_ordinary:** ORDINARY species-embodiment effect
- **body_class_place_shape:** mammoth-folk scale is the shape

## Voice and Perception

**Preferred metaphors:** estate-and-garden register (bloom, graft, prune, tend, yield, rotation, the orchard-stand, the kitchen-garden-rows); civic-correspondence formal (we have the honor, by your leave, with respect, under cover of separate post, by the morning bell); dowager-gossip register (scented-note cadence, the sealed-oral subjunctive, "one hears that," "as understood," "the Mellivers' situation"); never combat, never music, never theology beyond civic-procession decorum; an occasional old-money dry witticism (she is fond of the particular phrase "the register keeps its own record").

**Rhythm of speech:** formal compound-sentence at civic-function; warm-cadence-shorter at home with her son; scent-cadence at dowager-gossip teas (the pause after "one hears"); slower-shorter with her nephew-steward when they are alone reading the ledger.

**Taboo words:** specific facility-locations (Ash-Seal trade-secret-protected); specific-incident state-security rumor (CF-0042 diffuse register only); her late husband's final months' acquisition specifics (his last three purchases she has not been able to fully audit); the 12-winter-ago dowager-gossip circulation she initiated (she has never named it aloud; the Ilderry household's descendants are still in the circuit at edge-adjacency).

**What she notices first:** a guest's scent-indicator (high-end fragrance-work is class-marker she reads instantly); the new stamp in a drawing-room not her own (she has a circuit-memory of what stamps were there before); a dowager-correspondence arrival before the seal is broken (the weight of the paper, the fold-pattern, the presence or absence of scent); her son's eye-avoidance at a particular portrait (his late father's, in the east-wing landing); her nephew-steward's slight hesitation before a ledger-entry she cannot quite read.

**What she overlooks:** her own heat-stress in high summer (she registers it without naming it); her nephew's quiet preparation to take responsibility if she fails (he has begun arranging things she does not see; she has not asked him to).

**Species perception effects:** Cluster C low-frequency hearing picks up estate-hall arrival-cadences; her scale-presence reads to staff as authority whether or not she projects it; heat-vulnerability makes her summer-month routines shaped around cool chambers; her longevity-register is at 60 her awareness-of-time is longer than her human peers' same-age.

## Contradictions and Tensions

The estate protects itself by circulation that could unravel it; the son who should inherit avoids inheritance; the dowager-circuit she is in stabilizes Brinewick's scandal-containment and is the only people who could surface the scandal. Canon Althea's sixth letter is on her desk. Her son's refusal-of-charter-registration is in its fourth season. The Mellivers-stamp coincidence is seventeen hours old.

## Likely Story Hooks

- **Canon Althea's charter-audit-access reform-current campaign reaches her drawing-room formally.** The seventh letter, or Althea herself, arrives. The cellar-find's disposition-slip is the test.
- **The Mellivers' new declared-inventory stamp becomes a magistrate-docket item.** Orreline's dowager-gossip circuit circulation trail is the evidence the charter-audit would follow.
- **Her son Corran announces he will not take registration.** The nephew-steward is named as presumptive heir-of-record; the estate's future arrangement follows.
- **A civic-advisory seat invitation arrives formally** (not as late-husband-memorial placeholder — as her own seat). She must decide whether to accept; either answer changes the estate's civic-court profile.
- **A CF-0032 subsection journeyman circuit arrives for long-lead commission** (her tenant-village Cluster C worker needs oversize harness refit); he carries a clan-saga fragment from NCP-0003's clan as bardic material, linking the mosaic-mirror constellation.
- **Her late husband's seventh-piece declared-inventory is found to have contested provenance.** A Brinewick ward-inspector proposes re-classification. She must either absorb the ward-reserve budget hit or contest the re-classification — either way the seven-piece display is changed.
